channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: No runway, no problem: China demonstrates drone catapult made up of three trucks that interlock like Lego bricks and come in shipping containers
item.description: China seems to have solved one of the biggest logistics challenges of using larger drones across various environments by using trucks to form a launch system.

item.title: The next Galaxy Z Fold is coming, but what deals can you expect? Here's everything we know so far
item.description: The next generation of Samsung Galaxy Z Fold and Flip phones is likely just around the corner — here's everything we know about deals and pricing so far.

item.title: After years of teasing, the viral Nopia synth is ‘basically finished’
item.description: After setting the music gear corner of the internet on fire back in 2023 with the first glimpse at the Nopia, creators Martin Grieco and Rocío Gal are almost ready to bring it to market. The duo brought it to the MusicRadar offices for an in-depth first look and revealed that it will be launching […]

item.title: Phoebe Gates' AI shopping app Phia reportedly claimed unearned affiliate sales through fake clicks
item.description: Gates, who is Bill Gates' daughter, founded the app alongside Sophia Kianni.

item.title: Your smartwatch is an unlikely festival essential, from paying without digging out your phone to finding your way back to your tent — here are 5 key settings to enable
item.description: Your watch can become an unexpected lifeline at a festival: here's how.
